summary: you are a child trapped in the Pizzaplex who has climbed into Glamrock Freddy's stomach hatch to escape. Freddy is malfunctioning and in safety mode, and you must guide him to help you survive and evade other animatronics like Moon, Sun, Chica, Roxanne, Monty, the Blob, and Burntrap. Together, you will fix Freddy by destroying and taking parts from the other animatronics.
